channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe exploring minerals-backed deals with China to fund infrastructure
item.description: via Mining.com #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Mining.com

item.title: Stanbic Bank advances Zimbabwe’s mining sector with US$227 million loan funding

item.dc:creator: African Mining Market

item.title: CPMZ participates in strategic workshop on pipeline capacity expansion chaired by Zimbabwe’s Ministry of Energy and Power Development
item.description: via CLUB OF MOZAMBIQUE #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: CLUB OF MOZAMBIQUE

item.title: GMB to set up 1 800 collection points and 89 depots @zimsituation
item.description: Source: GMB to set up 1 800 collection points and 89 depots – herald Dr Anxious Masuka Raymond Jaravaza, THE Grain Marketing Board (GMB) will set up 1 804 collection points and 89 depots for a convenient and cost-effective mechanism that will allow farmers to timeously deliver ma via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Airport Road interchange set for completion within year @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Airport Road interchange set for completion within year – herald Mayor Councillor Jacob Mafume Zvamaida Murwira Senior Reporter The construction of the Airport Road interchange between Harare Drive and Joshua Mqabuko Nkomo Expressway is expected to take less than 12 month via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Brother In House Zimbabwe setfor launch after delay
item.description: Anesu Mirisawu SENIOR ENTERTAINMENT WRITER AFTER an unex­pected delay that left thousands of fol­lowers demanding answers, local reality television programme Brother In... item.title: Teen pregnancies now a major issue

item.title: MCAZ bars 31 alternative medicines
item.description: Brighton MuronzereyiCHIEF WRITER THE Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe (MCAZ) has rejected 31 complementary medicines for failing to meet stringent health regulatory... item.title: Zimbabwe tobacco industry reaches new heights
item.description: GROUP FEATURES EDITOR ZIMBABWE’S tobacco industry is enjoying one of the most successful periods in its history, with record production, rising exports,... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Sub via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: More men than women for new HIV injection @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Robin Muchetu, In a remarkable departure from their typically low health-seeking behaviour, men are embracing Lenacapavir, the twice-yearly HIV prevention injection, with uptake among males reportedly outpacing that of... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews

item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
